brief.outcome: WorkshopLM organizes messy thinking into a grounded Map

evidenceStatements.text: Professional teams lose hours turning meeting notes into client-ready presentations
The recommended workflow is Capture, Shape, Deliver
The professional reviews the Brief before output creation and reviews the Storyboard before video rendering

limitations: This run did not call GPT-5.6 or any paid provider.
This was controlled agent verification, not an uncoached professional usability test.
The provider-backed two-minute Map and external Send/Revise gates remain open.
